identity.mission: Create a Customer Portal that fuses Corporate Trust with Cultural Luxury. Avoid generic 'Bootstrap' looks. Prioritize asymmetry, deep texture, and emotional authority.
anti_patterns: No centered layouts for Hero sections.
No flat, shadowless cards (unless intentional brutalism).

theme_strategy.vibe: Corporate Oasis - Trusted, Stable, yet Golden and Premium.
theme_strategy.reasoning: ISO certification implies rigor and clarity (Light mode). Gold accents add the required 'Saudi Luxury' touch without being gaudy. Navy grounds it in trust.

english.usage: Use for all English text. Headings should be tight (tracking-tight).

arabic.usage: Use for all Arabic text. Ensure line-height is 1.6x minimum.

layout_strategy.grid_system: Use the 'Bento' grid. Mix spans. Never just 3 equal columns.
layout_strategy.direction: RTL/LTR Auto-switching. Ensure 'start' and 'end' classes are used instead of 'left' and 'right' where possible.

glassmorphism.usage: Use for RFQ Form container and Sticky Nav.

tracing_beam.usage: Use for the 'Track Order' status timeline.
tracing_beam.description: A gold line that fills as the status progresses.

patterns.usage: Subtle Islamic/Geometric pattern in the Hero background (low opacity).
patterns.style: Geometric thin lines, gold or navy, 5% opacity.

buttons.primary: bg-[#1e3a5f] text-white rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#152a45] transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] shadow-lg shadow-blue-900/20
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#1e3a5f] text-[#1e3a5f] rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-semibold hover:bg-[#1e3a5f] hover:text-white transition-all
buttons.gold: bg-[#c9a55c] text-white rounded-md px-8 py-4 font-bold hover:bg-[#b08d45] shadow-lg shadow-yellow-600/20

cards.service_card: bg-white rounded-xl p-8 border border-slate-100 hover:border-[#c9a55c]/50 transition-colors group relative overflow-hidden
cards.feature_icon: w-12 h-12 rounded-lg bg-[#1e3a5f]/5 text-[#1e3a5f] flex items-center justify-center mb-6 group-hover:bg-[#1e3a5f] group-hover:text-white transition-colors

forms.input: h-12 bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-[#c9a55c] focus:ring-[#c9a55c]/20 rounded-md transition-all
forms.label: text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-2 block

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px. Use gold color for accents.

motion.usage: Use for entering elements. Stagger children in grids.
motion.scrolling: Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling if possible.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update `tailwind.config.js` with the colors and font families defined above. Add 'dir' variant support.
3. UPDATE INDEX.CSS: Add the font imports at the top.
4. CREATE LAYOUT: Refactor the landing page to use the Bento Grid for services.
5. CUSTOMIZE SHADCN: Override default Shadcn styles in `components/ui` to match the 'Anti-AI' look (rounded-md, more padding).
6. RTL CHECK: Ensure all flex containers use `flex-start` or `flex-end` logic that respects RTL (e.g., `me-4` instead of `mr-4`).
7. DATA-TESTID: Add `data-testid` to all buttons and inputs.
8. FILE EXTENSION: Use .js and .jsx as per existing project structure. Do NOT create .ts files.
universal_guidelines: Do not center text in the Hero section.
Use 2x more padding than you think is necessary.
Always add a hover state to interactive elements.
